problem id: b69238c1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  00011000 -> 11001100
  00000110 -> 00110011
  11110111 -> 11111111
  01111011 -> 11111111
  00111100 -> 11111111
  00100110 -> 00110011
  10111111 -> 11111111
  01110110 -> 10111011
  01001001 -> 01101110
  11101111 -> 01111111

query: 11010001
predicted answer: 11101110
